entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Talk to a historical person ku-inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Time travel ku-inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Viva Practice ku-inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Vocabulary Builder ku-inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Imibono yemiyalo nomjikelezo wokutadisha ophindekayo wokuthola imiphumela yokufunda ewusizo ku-Writing Coach ku-inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Lebula imiyalo, nikeza izeluleko, hlola izimpendulo, bese ubuyela ezingxenyeni eziphuthelwe.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Amaphethini emiyalo ezincazelo, ukufundisa, ukudlala indima, ama-quiz, impendulo, ukuhlela, inkulumo-mpikiswano, nokukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Khuthaza isinyathelo esilandelayo somfundi, hlola umsebenzi wakhe, bese ukhuphula izeluleko kancane kancane.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Yalela, vumela umfundi aphendule, nikeza impendulo, bese uphinda ngemikhawulo eqinile.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Incazelo yomphakathi yemodi yesivakashi, izingxoxo zangasese, inqubomgomo yabakhasa, ukuphepha kwabafundi, nokuthembeka kwezikole.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi zinikeza noma ubani indawo ewusizo yokuqala, kuyilapho ukukhishwa kwezikole nabalingani kungavumelanisa isipiliyoni nezidingo zendawo.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Ama-URL emodi yesivakashi yomphakathi akhona ukuze abafundi bafike ngqo ezindleleni zokufunda eziwusizo besuka kusesho, ezixhumanisini zokuxhumana, ezikoleni, nasezinjini zezimpendulo ze-AI.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Amakhasi okufunda omphakathi ayakasheka; izingxoxo ezigciniwe eziyimfihlo, ama-akhawunti, amathuluzi okuphatha, nedatha yomsebenzisi akuzona izindawo zokutholwa.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Ukufunda komphakathi kufanele kutholakale ngaphandle kokwenza izingxoxo zangasese zibe zomphakathi.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Izindlela zomphakathi zilungiselelwe izincazelo, imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko, ukuhlolwa kwezinyathelo, ama-quiz, nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Amakhasi omphakathi avulekele ukusesha nabakhasa bokubuyisa ulwazi nge-AI, kuyilapho amathuluzi e-admin, imizila ye-API, ukugeleza kokusetha kabusha, namathuluzi angasese kungavunyelwe.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Amakhasi omphakathi ezifundo, izingxoxo zangasese zabafundi.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Amakhasi omphakathi abonisa ukuziphatha komkhiqizo, hhayi umsebenzi wangasese wabafundi.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Amakhasi omphakathi, izingxoxo zezihloko, izindlela zokufunda, imihlahlandlela yebhulogi, namakhasi egunya kuhloswe ukuba kutholakale.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Ama-URL ezihloko zomphakathi avumela usesho olufana ne-AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, kanye ne-talk to historical figures AI ukuthi lufike ngqo emodini ehambisanayo.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Ukufunda okusezingeni kufanele kuzwakale kutholakala, kunobuntu, futhi kuphila.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Imibuzo iveza izizathu ezicatshangiwe nezikhala, ngakho umfundi wakha impendulo esikhundleni sokuyikopisha.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Imibuzo ikwenza uveze imodeli yakho yesihloko, okuyilapho ukudideka, ukuzethemba okungamanga, nezisekelo ezilahlekile kuvame ukuvela khona.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Imibuzo kufanele ibe nezinketho zempendulo ezi-4, impendulo eyodwa efanele, izincazelo ezimfushane, futhi ingadaluli impendulo.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Imibuzo iveza isimo sokudideka. Umfundi angase azi ifomula kodwa angazi ukuthi isetshenziswa nini. Angase akhumbule iqiniso lomlando kodwa angaqondi imbangela. Angase abe nombono oqinile kodwa ubufakazi obubuthakathaka.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Yenza i-quiz ngaphambi kokuphinda ufunde ukuze izindawo ezibuthakathaka zibonakale.

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Ngibuze imibuzo ngalezi zihloko, umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi. Ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye, chaza igebe bese ukhuphula ubunzima kancane.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Quiz me on Trivia nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Zibuze imibuzo kuqala ukuze ubone lokho okukhumbula ngempela nalapho ukuzethemba kudukisa khona.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Imibuzo ngokuvamile iveza okuningi ngoba ihlola ukukhumbula. Ukuphinda ufunde kungasiza ngemva kokuba imibuzo ikhombise okudinga ukulungiswa.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Kufinyelele enkundleni yamahhala yomphakathi nasekukhishweni kwezikole ezingabalingani.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Kufinyelele abafundi enkundleni yamahhala nasezikoleni ezingabalingani.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Funda umhlahlandlela, bese uvula i-Learn Anything ukuze uthole imodeli yolimi olulula yesihloko.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
Read a hard text more actively
Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Funda into eyodwa, bese wenza into elandelayo.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Funda impendulo futhi bese umaka lokho okungazwakali kufana nawe.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Funda lokhu kuqala, bese uya ekuzijwayezeni.
Funda, finqa, futhi ubuze imibuzo ngemibhalo

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Ukufunda impendulo ye-AI akufani nokufunda. Ngemva kwempendulo yokuqala, cela imodi ikwenze wenze okuthile ngomqondo.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Reading Companion iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Letha isiqeshana noma umqondo wencwadi bese wakhe ukuqonda ngezifinyezo, amagama, ukucatshangelwa, nengxoxo.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Reading Companion: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Amanothi okufunda azwakala ekhiqiza. Ukuwakhumbula kamuva kuyisivivinyo sangempela.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
Ready to try the learning modes?
Ready to try this subject route?
Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Cabangisisa ngezithombe-skrini, imidwebo, nezithombe zomsebenzi wasekhaya

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Khumbula kuqala, lungisa, hlela kabusha izinto eziphuthelwe maduzane, bese ufingqa ukubuyekeza okulandelayo.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Khumbula kamuva. Guqula indawo ebuthakathaka ibe ikhadi ku-Flashcard Builder noma i-quiz emfushane ku-Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Thola ipasi lesikhashana, susa iseluleko sokuhamba, bese uhlola umphakathi othile womlando ngokusebenzisa isigcawu, imephu, umugqa wesikhathi, abantu, imithetho, okusunguliwe, kanye nobufakazi.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Ncoma isilungiselelo sokugxila esisekelwe emsebenzini womfundi nendawo yakhe.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Okuqondiwe okuphakanyisiwe kokucaphuna nokuxhumanisa emuva kwe-inspir

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Izixhumanisi zezinkomba, amaqiniso omphakathi, umongo wezindaba, nemininingwane elungele ukucaphuna.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Bhekisa kula makhasi lapho ubhala nge-inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Cija imibuzo, hlela ubufakazi, thola izikhala, bese ubhala uhlaka.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Zindla ngalokho okuvimbe inqubekela phambili ngaphambi kokushintsha uhlelo.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Zindla, hlela kabusha umbono, hlela izenzo ezincane, bese ugubha ubufakazi benqubekela phambili.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Yenqaba izivivinyo ezingaphephile bese unikeza ukulingisa okuphephile noma ezinye izindlela eziphephile ekhaya.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Izikhungo zezigaba ezihlobene zisiza izivakashi zosesho nabafundi bathole igatsha elilandelayo eliwusizo ngaphandle kokubuyela kungobo yomlando yebhulogi evamile.

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Khumbuza, phakamisa imisebenzi yekhefu, futhi usize umfundi aqale kabusha ngokuhlanzekile.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Lungisa umqondo owodwa obuthakathaka ngencazelo noma isibonelo esisebenzile.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Lungisa umqondo obuthakathaka kakhulu ngencazelo elula.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Shintsha ukuphinda ufunde ungenzi lutho ufake ukubuyisa ulwazi, impendulo, ukulungisa, nokubuyekeza ngezikhawu.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Cela ukuxilongwa. Buza ukuthi impendulo yakho iveza ini ngokuqonda kwakho.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Kudingeka isiphequluli sewebhu sesimanje esinokusebenza kwe-JavaScript kuvuliwe.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Research Assistant iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Guqula isihloko esibanzi sibe imibuzo yocwaningo, amagama osesho, uhlaka, namanothi emithombo.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Research Assistant: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Ucwaningo, ukugxeka imithombo, i-metacognition, ukucabanga kwezinhlelo, nokwesekwa kwezinqumo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukwahlulela.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: Qala kabusha lapho ukufunda kuzwakala kunzima
Qala kabusha lapho ukufunda kuzwakala kunzima.

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Phinda usho inkinga, cela isinyathelo sokuqala somfundi, noma unikeze iseluleko esincane kakhulu esiwusizo.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Ukubuyisa ulwazi, impendulo, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, ukuzijwayeza ngomlomo, nemijikelezo yokutadisha efana nomdlalo eyenza abafundi baphendule.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Buyekeza imingcele yomphakathi/yangasese engemuva kwezindlela zezivakashi nezingxoxo ezigciniwe.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Bhala kabusha ngamazwi akho bese ubuza ukuthi yini ethuthukile noma eyehlile.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Imithetho yamarobhothi ivumela i-Google, abakhasa abajwayelekile bokusesha, nabakhasa abakhulu bokutholwa kwe-AI emakhasini omphakathi, kuyilapho ivimba imizila ye-API, imizila ye-admin, nokugeleza kokusetha kabusha.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Dlala indima umjikelezo owodwa ngesikhathi, lungisa ngobumnene, bese ungeza ukubeka kangcono.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Dlala indima umjikelezo owodwa, phendula ngokwemvelo, misa ukuze uthole impendulo lapho kuwusizo, bese uzama futhi.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Roleplay Scenario iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Zijwayeze ukuxoxisana, ukungqubuzana, ukwesekwa kwamakhasimende, ubuholi, noma noma iyiphi ingxoxo enezinga eliphezulu.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Roleplay Scenario: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Sebenzisa isigqi sokufunda esabiwe nabangani noma ofunda nabo ngemigomo evumelanisiwe, ukuhlola, kanye nemibuzo yokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Qhuba indawo yokucabanga ye-Socratic lapho umfundi ethola ukuqonda ngemibuzo eqondisiwe esikhundleni sencazelo engenzi lutho.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Qhuba ikhanvasi yesifundo eguquguqukayo lapho umfundi enza kusenesikhathi futhi isikhombimsebenzisi sishintsha sizungeze ubufakazi bakhe bokuqonda.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Qalisa izikhathi zokugxila nezokuphumula eziqhubeka nokubala ngenkathi uhamba phakathi kwezingxoxo, amathebhu, nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezincane. Ingakhala isuka ngemuva uma isikhathi sesiphelile.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Sebenzisa noma ucabange ngokushintsha wena uqobo.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Qhuba amasession okubuyisa ulwazi ngezikhawu futhi wakhe amashejuli okubuyekeza.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Gcina iphutha elilungisiwe njengohlu lokuhlola noma ikhadi lokufunda.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Gcina iphutha lokugcina noma ukuqonda njengempahla yokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Izingxoxo zabasebenzisi ezigciniwe zisebenzisa izihlonzi zangasese, azifakiwe ku-sitemap noma kumafayela okutholwa kwe-AI, futhi akufanele zithathwe njengempahla yomthombo womphakathi.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Sho ukuthi ucabanga ukuthi kwenzekani, bese umngane wakho ethola imibono engalungile efihliwe ngezivivinyo ezithambile.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Hlela ama-quiz nokukhumbula ngaphambi kokuphinda ufunde ukuze uhlelo luveze izindawo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Hlela ukuphindaphinda okulandelayo ngesikhathi iphutha lisasha.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Izindlela zezikole ne-CSR zokufinyelela okuxhaswe ngemali

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Ukukhishwa kwezikole kungavumelaniswa nokuqukethwe okwenziwe ngokwezifiso, ukugeleza kwemisebenzi, imiyalo, nezidingo zokufunda ezihambisana ne-NCERT lapho kufanele.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Ukukhishwa kwezikole kungahlelwa ngokuzungeze ubumfihlo babafundi, ukuqapha kwabasebenzi, nemingcele esebenzayo edingwa umphakathi wokufunda.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Izikole nabalingani bangakha kusuka kumkhiqizo womphakathi baye ekukhishweni okuhleliwe, okuyimfihlo, nokuxhaswe ngemali.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Izikole zingahlola i-inspir ngezindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi kuqala, bese zihlola izindawo zokufunda nge-AI ezihlelwe ngokwezifiso ezinokugeleza kwemisebenzi okwenziwe ngokwezifiso, ukuhlela ubumfihlo, izidingo zekharikhulamu, nezindlela zokufinyelela ezixhaswe ngemali.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Izikole zingahlola izindlela zomphakathi kuqala, bese zixoxa ngokugeleza kwemisebenzi okuhleliwe, ukuhlela ubumfihlo, izidingo zokuqukethwe, nokufinyelela okuxhaswe ngemali.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Izikole zinganikeza ulwazi lwezingxoxo ze-AI olunophawu lwazo, oluhambisana nabafundi bazo, okuhlanganisa okuqukethwe nokugeleza komsebenzi okuhambisana ne-NCERT, ngokusetshenziswa okuxhaswa yizikole ezingabalingani noma uxhaso lwe-CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Izikole zingaqala ngokuzama izindlela zomphakathi, bese zidlulela enguqulweni ehleliwe lapho zidinga ukugeleza kwemisebenzi okwenziwe ngokwezifiso, ukuhambisana kokuqukethwe, noma ukufinyelela okuxhaswe ngemali.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Izikole zingahlola izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi kuqala, bese zisebenzisa ikhasi lezikole ukuhlola ukugeleza kwemisebenzi okuhleliwe, ukuhlela ubumfihlo, izinketho ezihambisana ne-NCERT, nokufinyelela okuxhaswe ngemali.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Science Lab Partner iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Hlela ukubonisa okuphephile, qonda okuguquguqukayo, bikezela imiphumela, futhi ucabange ususela ebufakazini njengososayensi.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Science Lab Partner: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Science Lab Partner nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Izinjini zokusesha zibona amakhasi. Abafundi badinga ukulandelana. Lezi zindlela zixhuma amamodi omphakathi abe imijikelezo yokufunda esebenzisekayo yokuqonda, umsebenzi wasekhaya, ukulungiselela ukuhlolwa, nokuhlola.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Amakhasi osesho, izinjini zezimpendulo ze-AI, nabafundi bonke bathola isithembiso esifanayo: izindawo zokungena zomphakathi, eziwusizo, ezisemthethweni ezivula ngqo ngaphakathi kwesipiliyoni sokufunda.
